info.english_meaning: to vibrate to shake to move a little to palpitate to quake to tremble to kick

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'Arzo'yaM dEvanizpando yastvAmaBigamizyati' (rA0 35534) nizpandaH sambanDa iti BUzaRam snehabanDa iti tilakaH
'suKasADanAni ca prArTayamAnaH kAyena vAcA manasA ca parispandate' (yo0 sU0 BA0 215) parispandate cezwate
